title: Polaris Event
description: Canonical event structure for Polaris. This schema is normative. All compliant implementations MUST conform to this structure.

event_id.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the canonical encoding of this event. Serves as the stable unique identifier and enables canonical pointer referencing.

event_type.description: Normative Polaris event category. Determines which payload fields are authoritative.

canonical_encoding_version.description: Version tag for the canonical encoding rules applied to this event. MUST be '1.0.0' for this version of the specification.

canonical_pointer_ref.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the immediate causal predecessor event. MUST be null only for genesis events.

context.description: Deterministic execution context required for validation and replay. All fields are normative.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event creation. MUST include timezone designator Z.

agent_id.description: Canonical identifier for the agent, system, or authority that produced this event.

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence number local to agent_id. MUST increment by 1 for each successive event. Used for deterministic replay ordering.

contextual_tags.description: Optional structured metadata for policy and execution context. Non-normative for causal binding.

candidate_payload.description: Candidate execution or state-transition payload. Canonical encoding rules determine serialization for hashing. Intentionally extensible.

action_payload.description: Optional action-specific payload for execution_request and execution_receipt event types. Intentionally extensible.

authority_signature.description: Primary normative attestation over the canonical encoding of this event. Required for all event types regardless of authority role.

signer.description: Canonical identifier of the signing authority.

signature_scheme.description: Normative algorithm identifier. MUST be 'ed25519' for this version of the specification.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature over the canonical encoding of this event.

signatures.description: Optional additional attestations supporting multi-authority validation. Supplements authority_signature; does not replace it.

validation_proof.description: Optional structured proof object produced by a validator. Used by verification_model for gate-profile attestation. Not required for causal binding.
